description_long: This is a medium-sized hardcover book with a pale, slightly worn cover that has a textured, almost leathery appearance. The front cover features a monochrome photograph of several cows standing in a field, set against a muted background with a vertical band of lighter color and faint Cyrillic text. The spine is narrow and displays a faded label with additional text, while the back cover is plain and unadorned, showing only the textured surface. The book's edges are straight and the corners are slightly rounded, indicating some use. The overall color palette is subdued, dominated by shades of gray, beige, and off-white. The book appears sturdy and is likely filled with paper pages bound together inside the hard covers.
description: A medium-sized, pale hardcover book with a textured cover and a monochrome photograph of cows on the front. The design is simple and worn, with muted colors and Cyrillic text.
description_view_0: The spine of the book is visible, showing a faded label with text and a hint of the textured cover wrapping around the edges.
description_view_1: The front cover is shown, featuring a monochrome photograph of cows, a vertical band of lighter color, and Cyrillic text.
description_view_2: The opposite edge of the book is visible, showing the plain, light-colored side with no text or imagery.
description_view_3: The back cover is visible, displaying a plain, textured surface with no illustrations or text.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a monochrome photograph of several cows standing in a field, rendered in a documentary or archival style. The image is set against a muted, textured background with a vertical band of lighter color. No other prominent artwork or decorative illustration is visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is narrow and covered in the same pale, textured material as the covers, with a faded rectangular label containing text. The text is oriented vertically and is somewhat difficult to read due to wear.
